'''√n-b-zh''' ('''nabazha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:percuss|percuss]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-b-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:percuss|percuss]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √n-b-zh
|-
! Lemma
| nabazha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:nabazhithi|nabazhithi]] || [[word:nabazhiji|nabazhiji]] || [[word:nabazhishi|nabazhishi]] || [[word:nabazhi|nabazhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nabazhuthuth|nabazhuthuth]] || [[word:nabazhujuj|nabazhujuj]] || [[word:nabazhushush|nabazhushush]] || [[word:nabazh|nabazh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nabazhuthu|nabazhuthu]] || [[word:nabazhuju|nabazhuju]] || [[word:nabazhushu|nabazhushu]] || [[word:nabazhu|nabazhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nabazhufuth|nabazhufuth]] || [[word:nabazhufuj|nabazhufuj]] || [[word:nabazhufush|nabazhufush]] || [[word:nabazhuf|nabazhuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nabazhethe|nabazhethe]] || [[word:nabazheje|nabazheje]] || [[word:nabazheshe|nabazheshe]] || [[word:nabazhe|nabazhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nabazhothoth|nabazhothoth]] || [[word:nabazhojoj|nabazhojoj]] || [[word:nabazhoshosh|nabazhoshosh]] || [[word:nabazh|nabazh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nabazhotho|nabazhotho]] || [[word:nabazhojo|nabazhojo]] || [[word:nabazhosho|nabazhosho]] || [[word:nabazho|nabazho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nabazhofoth|nabazhofoth]] || [[word:nabazhofoj|nabazhofoj]] || [[word:nabazhofosh|nabazhofosh]] || [[word:nabazhof|nabazhof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:nabazhïf|nabazhïf]] || [[word:nabazhïf|nabazhïf]] || [[word:nabazhïf|nabazhïf]] || [[word:nabazhïf|nabazhïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:nabazhïfïf|nabazhïfïf]] || [[word:nabazhïfïf|nabazhïfïf]] || [[word:nabazhïfïf|nabazhïfïf]] || [[word:nabazhïfïf|nabazhïfïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:nabazhïf|nabazhïf]] || [[word:nabazhïf|nabazhïf]] || [[word:nabazhïf|nabazhïf]] || [[word:nabazhïf|nabazhïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:nabazhïf|nabazhïf]] || [[word:nabazhïf|nabazhïf]] || [[word:nabazhïf|nabazhïf]] || [[word:nabazhïf|nabazhïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:nabazhæthæ|nabazhæthæ]] || [[word:nabazhæjæ|nabazhæjæ]] || [[word:nabazhæshæ|nabazhæshæ]] || [[word:nabazhæ|nabazhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nabazhathath|nabazhathath]] || [[word:nabazhajaj|nabazhajaj]] || [[word:nabazhashash|nabazhashash]] || [[word:nabazh|nabazh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nabazhatha|nabazhatha]] || [[word:nabazhaja|nabazhaja]] || [[word:nabazhasha|nabazhasha]] || [[word:nabazha|nabazha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nabazhafath|nabazhafath]] || [[word:nabazhafaj|nabazhafaj]] || [[word:nabazhafash|nabazhafash]] || [[word:nabazhaf|nabazhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:nabazhasha|nabazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gonabazhasha|gonabazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokinabazhasha|gokinabazhasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:nabazhnüsha|nabazhnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gonabazhnknüsha|gonabazhnknüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokinabazhnüsha|gokinabazhnüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:nabazhshësha|nabazhshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gonabazhnkshësha|gonabazhnkshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokinabazhshësha|gokinabazhshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:nabazhrosha|nabazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonabazhnkrosha|gonabazhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinabazhrosha|gokinabazhrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:nabazhmusha|nabazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gonabazhnkmusha|gonabazhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinabazhmusha|gokinabazhmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:nabazhsherasha|nabazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gonabazhnksherasha|gonabazhnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokinabazhsherasha|gokinabazhsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:nabazhngasha|nabazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gonabazhnkngasha|gonabazhnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokinabazhngasha|gokinabazhngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:nabazhyasha|nabazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gonabazhnkyasha|gonabazhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokinabazhyasha|gokinabazhyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:nabazhyamasha|nabazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gonabazhnkyamasha|gonabazhnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokinabazhyamasha|gokinabazhyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:nabazhnüshësha|nabazhnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonabazhnknüshësha|gonabazhnknüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinabazhnüshësha|gokinabazhnüshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nabazhnürosha|nabazhnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonabazhnknürosha|gonabazhnknürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinabazhnürosha|gokinabazhnürosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nabazhnümusha|nabazhnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonabazhnknümusha|gonabazhnknümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinabazhnümusha|gokinabazhnümusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:nabazhshënüsha|nabazhshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonabazhnkshënüsha|gonabazhnkshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinabazhshënüsha|gokinabazhshënüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nabazhshërosha|nabazhshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonabazhnkshërosha|gonabazhnkshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinabazhshërosha|gokinabazhshërosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nabazhshëmusha|nabazhshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonabazhnkshëmusha|gonabazhnkshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinabazhshëmusha|gokinabazhshëmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:nabazhronüsha|nabazhronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonabazhnkronüsha|gonabazhnkronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinabazhronüsha|gokinabazhronüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:nabazhroshësha|nabazhroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonabazhnkroshësha|gonabazhnkroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinabazhroshësha|gokinabazhroshësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:nabazhromusha|nabazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gonabazhnkromusha|gonabazhnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokinabazhromusha|gokinabazhromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:nabazhmunüsha|nabazhmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gonabazhnkmunüsha|gonabazhnkmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokinabazhmunüsha|gokinabazhmunüsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:nabazhmushësha|nabazhmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gonabazhnkmushësha|gonabazhnkmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokinabazhmushësha|gokinabazhmushësha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:nabazhmurosha|nabazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gonabazhnkmurosha|gonabazhnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokinabazhmurosha|gokinabazhmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:nabazh|nabazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:næbæzh|næbæzh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:honabazh|honabazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:honæbæzh|honæbæzh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohonabazh|hohonabazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohonæbæzh|hohonæbæzh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nünabazh|nünabazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nünæbæzh|nünæbæzh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nününabazh|nününabazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nününæbæzh|nününæbæzh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nïnabazh|nïnabazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nïnæbæzh|nïnæbæzh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïnabazh|nïnïnabazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nïnïnæbæzh|nïnïnæbæzh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lunabazh|lunabazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lunæbæzh|lunæbæzh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulunabazh|lulunabazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulunæbæzh|lulunæbæzh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:linabazh|linabazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:linæbæzh|linæbæzh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilinabazh|lilinabazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilinæbæzh|lilinæbæzh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:konabazh|konabazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:konæbæzh|konæbæzh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokonabazh|kokonabazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokonæbæzh|kokonæbæzh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kenabazh|kenabazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kenæbæzh|kenæbæzh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekenabazh|kekenabazh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekenæbæzh|kekenæbæzh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
